topic: How one Oman retail company cut payroll prep from three days to two hours after switching to WPS-integrated payroll
format: Lead with a specific customer outcome — time saved, errors eliminated, hours recovered — then describe what changed
post:
Three days of payroll prep. Every single month.

That was the reality for one Oman-based retail company before they moved to SmartPro Hub. HR staff manually cross-checking attendance, building salary sheets, formatting bank files — all before a single riyal moved.

After switching to WPS-integrated payroll on SmartPro Hub, that same process takes two hours.

Here's what actually changed:

Attendance data feeds directly into payroll. Bank transfer files generate automatically in WPS-compliant format. SPF contributions calculate without a separate spreadsheet. The finance team reviews, approves, and submits. Done.

No reformatting. No back-and-forth between HR and accounts. No last-minute errors flagged by the bank.

That's 20+ hours recovered every month — hours that now go toward actual operations instead of chasing spreadsheet errors.

SmartPro Hub built WPS payroll specifically for Oman businesses: direct bank integration, SPF and Omanization compliance included, bilingual Arabic and English. Starting at OMR 25/month.

If your team still dreads payroll week, that's a process problem. Not a people problem.

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=general
